All checks pass. Plan execution complete.
## Summary
**PR**: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9035
**Changes made:**
1. **`.github/workflows/ci.yml`** — Changed 5 speculative jobs (`lint`, `ty`, `unit-tests`, `integration-tests`, `erk-mcp-tests`) to depend only on `check-submission` instead of both `check-submission` and `fix-formatting`. Removed `pushed != 'true'` condition from their `if:` clauses. Format-sensitive jobs (`format`, `docs-check`) remain unchanged.
2. **`docs/learned/ci/job-ordering-strategy.md`** — Rewrote from three-tier to two-track architecture diagram. Updated tripwire from "all validation jobs must depend on fix-formatting" to "only format-sensitive jobs depend on fix-formatting."
3. **`docs/learned/ci/workflow-gating-patterns.md`** — Updated the `pushed` output section to clarify it only applies to format-sensitive jobs; speculative jobs rely on `cancel-in-progress`.
4. **`docs/learned/ci/formatting-workflow.md`** — Updated integration points to describe the two-track CI architecture.
5. **Tripwire indexes** — Regenerated via `erk docs sync`.
